# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to download')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_SERVER', defaultValue: '', description: 'Production server where artifacts will be deployed')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactUrls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',')
                    artifactUrls.each { url ->
                        echo "Downloading artifact from: ${url}"
                        sh "curl -O ${url}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactFiles = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',').collect { url -> url.tokenize('/').last() }
                    artifactFiles.each { file ->
                        echo "Deploying ${file} to ${params.DEPLOY_SERVER}"
                        sh "scp ${file} user@${params.DEPLOY_SERVER}:/path/to/deployment"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        success {
            echo 'Deployment completed successfully.'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Deployment failed.'
        }
    }
}
